# llms.txt - Site Information

## Overview

[SITE_DESCRIPTION]

## Site Structure

### Main Sections
- **Homepage** (/) - Featured products, categories, promotions, testimonials
- **Shop** (/shop) - Product catalog with filters, search, and pagination
- **Blog** (/blog) - Articles, news, and educational content
- **About** (/about) - Company history, mission, values, and team
- **Help Center** (/help) - Customer support, shipping info, returns policy
- **Account** (/account) - User dashboard, orders, addresses, preferences

### E-commerce Features
- Product catalog with detailed descriptions and media
- Shopping cart with real-time inventory
- Secure checkout with Stripe and EuPago (MB Way, Multibanco)
- Order tracking and history
- User authentication (NextAuth 5)
- Cookie consent and GDPR compliance

### Legal & Compliance
- Privacy policy (/legal/privacy-policy)
- Terms of service (/legal/terms-of-service)
- Cookie policy (/legal/cookie-policy)
- Refund policy (/legal/refund-policy)

## Technology Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (React 19, App Router)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, Radix UI
- **Database**: Multi-provider support (PostgreSQL/Firebase)
- **Payments**: Stripe, EuPago (MB Way, Multibanco)
- **Authentication**: NextAuth 5
- **Internationalization**: next-intl (multi-language)
- **Email**: React Email with Resend
- **Analytics**: Google Analytics 4
- **PWA**: Progressive Web App support

## Content Organization

### For Customers
- Product pages with descriptions, specifications, reviews, and pricing
- Support resources: FAQ, contact forms, live chat
- User account features: order history, saved addresses

### For Businesses/Partners
- Wholesale information
- Partnership opportunities
- Affiliate program
- B2B pricing

### For Media
- Press releases and media kit at /press
- High-resolution product images
- Company fact sheets
- Press contact: [PRESS_EMAIL]

## API & Data Access

### Public API Endpoints
- `/api/query/public/catalog` - Product listings
- `/api/query/public/categories` - Product categories
- `/api/query/public/site_settings` - Site configuration
- `/api/query/public/blocks` - Dynamic content blocks

### Data Structure
- Products: name, description, price, category, images, stock
- Categories: hierarchical taxonomy with SEO metadata
- Blog posts: title, content, author, date, tags, featured image
- User orders: items, status, tracking, payment method

## SEO & Structured Data

### Metadata
- JSON-LD structured data on all pages
- OrganizationJsonLd with company information
- LocalBusinessJsonLd for location-based searches
- ProductJsonLd on product pages
- BreadcrumbJsonLd for navigation
- FAQJsonLd on help pages

### Key Pages for Crawling
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots.txt: /robots.txt
- RSS Feed: /blog/rss.xml

## Important Information

### Business Details
- Company Name: [COMPANY_NAME]
- Location: [COMPANY_LOCATION]
- Service Area: [SERVICE_AREA]
- Business Hours: [BUSINESS_HOURS]
- Contact: [CONTACT_EMAIL], [CONTACT_PHONE]
- Website: [SITE_URL]

### Shipping & Delivery
- Free shipping on orders over [FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD]
- Express delivery available
- [DELIVERY_TIMEFRAME] delivery time

## Documentation Sources

### Product Information
- Individual product pages: /shop/[product-slug]
- Category pages: /shop/[category-slug]

### Company Information
- About us: /about
- Press kit: /press
- Contact: /help/contact
- Terms & policies: /legal/*

### Developer Resources
- GitHub documentation: /docs folder
- API documentation: /docs/API_ENDPOINTS_IMPROVEMENTS.md
- Cache system: /docs/CACHE_SYSTEM.md
- Authentication: /docs/AUTH_OPTIMIZATION.md

## Content Guidelines

### Target Audience
- Location: [TARGET_LOCATION]
- Interest: [TARGET_INTEREST]
- Knowledge level: [TARGET_KNOWLEDGE_LEVEL]

### Content Tone
- Professional yet approachable
- Educational and informative
- Transparent about product quality and sourcing
- Compliant with applicable regulations

## Special Features

### User Experience
- Cookie consent with GDPR compliance
- Mobile-responsive design
- PWA with offline support
- Fast page loads with caching
- Search with instant results

### Community Features
- Product reviews and ratings
- Newsletter subscription
- Social media integration

### Customer Service
- Email: [CONTACT_EMAIL]
- Phone: [CONTACT_PHONE]
- Live chat: Available on site during business hours
- Help center: /help

- Email: [PRESS_EMAIL]
- Media kit: /press
- Press releases: Available for download

### Business Inquiries
